string_table.name: npxnabnsnfns10111011101
string_table.string: Use the w, a, s, and d keys to move around the 360 degree image. Press the tab key to jump to interactive markers and hotspots.
To watch this video, use the preview feature in Storyline 360, upload your published output to a server, publish to Review 360, or switch to static video quality.
Streaming video is unavailable for local playback.
You must complete the question before submitting.
Enter your name in the field below:
You have reached the time limit set for the quiz. Press 'OK' to continue.

slidetranscripts.slidetranscript:
<Document xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xmlns:xsd="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema"> <Content> <Block> <Style /> <Span Text="Welcome to this course on AI Adoption. 
" /> </Block> <Block> <Style /> <Span Text="
" /> </Block> <Block> <Style /> <Span Text="You should hear audio narration, so please adjust your speakers or use headphones if necessary. 
" /> </Block> <Block> <Style /> <Span Text="
" /> </Block> <Block> <Style /> <Span Text="This course will take approximately 20 minutes to complete. 
" /> </Block> <Block> <Style /> <Span Text="
" /> </Block> <Block> <Style /> <Span Text="Select the Next button when you are ready to begin." /> </Block> </Content> </Document>

<Document xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xmlns:xsd="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema"> <Content> <Block> <Style /> <Span Text="Select each button to learn more and then select the Conclusion button to finish the course." /> </Block> </Content> </Document>

<Document xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xmlns:xsd="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema"> <Content> <Block> <Style /> <Span Text="AI-powered process automation uses artificial intelligence to perform repetitive tasks without human intervention, improving efficiency and accuracy. 
" /> </Block> <Block> <Style /> <Span Text="
" /> </Block> <Block> <Style /> <Span Text="It involves leveraging AI technologies like machine learning and robotic process automation (RPA) to automate business processes." /> </Block> </Content> </Document>

<Document xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xmlns:xsd="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema"> <Content> <Block> <Style /> <Span Text="AI can significantly enhance customer experience by personalizing interactions, tailoring services and recommendations to individual preferences, which boosts satisfaction and engagement.
" /> </Block> <Block> <Style /> <Span Text="
" /> </Block> <Block> <Style /> <Span Text="Additionally, AI plays a crucial role in analyzing vast amounts of customer data, uncovering valuable insights into behavior and sentiment. 
" /> </Block> <Block> <Style /> <Span Text="
" /> </Block> <Block> <Style /> <Span Text="This enables businesses to anticipate needs, address pain points proactively, and continuously refine their offerings, creating a more seamless and responsive experience for customers." /> </Block> </Content> </Document>

<Document xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xmlns:xsd="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema"> <Content> <Block> <Style /> <Span Text="AI plays a key role in data-driven decision-making by processing vast amounts of data quickly to identify trends and make accurate predictions. 
" /> </Block> <Block> <Style /> <Span Text="
" /> </Block> <Block> <Style /> <Span Text="Tools and algorithms such as machine learning and natural language processing enable businesses to analyze customer behavior, market patterns, and feedback, providing actionable insights. 
" /> </Block> <Block> <Style /> <Span Text="
" /> </Block> <Block> <Style /> <Span Text="This allows companies to make informed decisions, optimize operations, and tailor strategies to meet customer needs more effectively." /> </Block> </Content> </Document>

<Document xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xmlns:xsd="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema"> <Content> <Block> <Style /> <Span Text="To recap, process automation allows businesses to streamline repetitive tasks, improving efficiency and reducing human error, such as in manufacturing or customer support. 
" /> </Block> <Block> <Style /> <Span Text="
" /> </Block> <Block> <Style /> <Span Text="AI also enhances customer experience by personalizing interactions, providing 24/7 service through chatbots, and analyzing customer feedback to improve satisfaction. 
" /> </Block> <Block> <Style /> <Span Text="
" /> </Block> <Block> <Style /> <Span Text="Lastly, AI supports data-driven decision-making by processing vast amounts of data to uncover trends, predict outcomes, and optimize strategies, helping companies make more informed, accurate business decisions." /> </Block> </Content> </Document>

<Document xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xmlns:xsd="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema"> <Content> <Block> <Style /> <Span Text="Thank you for taking the time to complete this course. 
" /> </Block> <Block> <Style /> <Span Text="
" /> </Block> <Block> <Style /> <Span Text="You may now close your browser window." /> </Block> </Content> </Document>

terms.term: A four-step framework for implementing AI by prioritizing projects, learning best practices, acting on opportunities, and continuously improving.
AI tools that analyze historical and real-time data to predict sales trends, customer behavior, and marketing outcomes.
The use of AI to personalize customer interactions, anticipate customer needs, and improve support quality while reducing wait times.
Using AI to analyze large datasets, identify patterns, improve forecasting, and support faster, more informed business decisions.
Using AI to automate repetitive business tasks, improving efficiency while reducing costs and human error.
AI-powered tools that provide instant customer support by answering questions, assisting users, and handling routine requests 24/7.
The use of AI to capture, organize, and process data automatically, reducing manual entry and improving accuracy.
AI systems that monitor inventory, forecast demand, and automatically trigger reorders to maintain optimal stock levels.
A branch of AI in which algorithms learn from data to recognize patterns, make predictions, and improve performance over time.
An AI technology that enables computers to understand, interpret, and respond to human language in text or speech.
AI-driven automation that manages order processing from validation through inventory updates and shipping coordination.
Using AI to analyze financial data, detect fraud, assess credit risk, and identify potential financial vulnerabilities.
Technology that automates repetitive, rules-based business tasks by mimicking human interactions with digital systems.
AI tools that analyze customer feedback to identify emotions, opinions, and trends that help improve products and services.
The use of AI to optimize logistics, forecast demand, reduce costs, and improve supply chain efficiency.
